name: t3x
description: T3X - Semantic extraction, diff, and merge for conversational AI

scripts.build: npm run build:core && npm run build:cli
scripts.clean: npm run clean -w @t3x/core && npm run clean -w t3x-cli
scripts.test: npm run test -w @t3x/core && npm run test -w t3x-cli
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @t3x/core && npm run lint -w t3x-cli
